TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Quri ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 31 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Quri hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Quri hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quri hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quri hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quri hya' ga Piyaway. tay mkyahu' na Quri hya' ga Uruw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ quri ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na quri ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na quri ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa pijawaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa uruw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Quri ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 31 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Quri hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Quri hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Quri hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quri hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Quri hya' ga Piyaway. tay mkyahu' na Quri hya' ga Uruw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ quri ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na quri ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na quri ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa pijawaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na quri ħjaʔ ɣa uruw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
